# CSP ZEEBRUGGE TERMINAL

Ocean TerminalPort: Zeebrugge

Location:Zeebrugge

**CSP ZEEBRUGGE TERMINAL** is a container terminalin Zeebrugge ( [see more Zeebrugge terminals](https://terminal49.com/ports/bezee)).

Terminal49 combines terminal data, carrier data, AIS data, and other sources to provide real-time container tracking for all your shipments. This allows us to provide high-value data such as **container availability** and **Last Free Day (LFD)** which are not always available from the shipping line.

### Track shipments and containers to CSP ZEEBRUGGE TERMINAL with Terminal49

Enter your Master Bill of Lading, Booking Number, or Container Number to get started:

Select shipping line (Auto detect)APLACLANLCMA CGMCOSCOCULinesCrowleyEvergreenGold star lineHamburg SudHapag-LloydHMMICLMaerskMatsonMSCONEOOCLPILSM LineSafmarineSealand EuropeSeaLeadSealand AmericasSeth ShippingSwireT.S. LinesTransfarTurkonWan HaiWestwoodYangMingZIMTrack for free

### Terminal49 Services

#### Real-time Container Tracking

Terminal49 provides real-time container tracking for CSP ZEEBRUGGE TERMINAL, including container availability, last free day information, and dwell time metrics when available.

[Sign Up For Free](https://app.terminal49.com/signup) [View API Integration Docs](https://terminal49.com/docs)

### How tracking to CSP ZEEBRUGGE TERMINAL works

#### Upload your tracking number

Get started with a Booking Number, a Container Number, or a Master Bill of Lading using any of these methods:

- [Dashboard form](https://help.terminal49.com/articles/8311707-how-to-add-shipments-via-dashboard)
- Upload a CSV
- [Email us a CSV](https://help.terminal49.com/articles/5506959-how-to-add-shipments-via-email)
- [API](https://terminal49.com/container-tracking-api)

![Terminal49 dashboard showing tracking number upload interface](https://terminal49.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Ftracking-numbers-screenshot.07325db9.jpg&w=1200&q=95)

* * *

#### Get real-time updates on your containers

We send you updates for all key milestones in a container's journey and have carrier and terminal events updated within minutes.

You can receive updates whichever way works for your operations: through email notifications, [our API](https://terminal49.com/container-tracking-api), [DataSync](https://terminal49.com/data-sync), or one of our many dashboards and reports.

![Terminal49 real-time container updates interface](https://terminal49.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Fcontainers-updates-screenshot.ceaebc36.jpg&w=1200&q=95)

# Welcome to CSP Zeebrugge, the bridge to Europe

## Let's meet

# The bridge to Europe

We look at your business with an open mind. Versatility and an open mind are in our DNA. We are not afraid to experiment or innovate.

Welcome to CSP Zeebrugge. The Port of Zeebrugge offers **direct access to the European market**, the continent with the highest population density. Located directly at the open sea, CSP Zeebrugge is **very close to the main shipping routes in North Western Europe and can cater to the largest container vessels in the world**. First class intermodal connections, including **rail** and **access** to the national and **European highway systems**, are available.

The Zeebrugge facility benefits from no marine and land based congestion, which improves the service quality significantly. It is a coastal port with excellent hub capabilities to the UK, Ireland, Scandinavia and the Baltic region. CSP Zeebrugge is a state-of-the-art common-user terminal with **7 super post-panamax** **ZPMC gantry cranes**.

Video Player

[https://cspterminals.be/wp-content/uploads/2019/02/0016-01-CSP-Terminals-Bedrijfsvideo\_v14\_LR-1.mp4](https://cspterminals.be/wp-content/uploads/2019/02/0016-01-CSP-Terminals-Bedrijfsvideo_v14_LR-1.mp4)

# Our businesses

![](https://cspterminals.be/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/P1270387.jpg)

![Stevedoaring icon](https://cspterminals.be/wp-content/uploads/2018/08/0190-01_CSP_WEB_iconen-05-1-120x120.png)

## Stevedoring

CSP Zeebrugge is located directly at the sea coast (close to the main shipping routes in North West Europe) and offers excellent nautical access for even the largest container vessels.

[Read more](https://cspterminals.be/our-businesses/stevedoring/)

![Inland Connections icon](https://cspterminals.be/wp-content/uploads/2018/08/0190-01_CSP_WEB_iconen-06-120x120.png)

## Hinterland connections

Our port enjoys the ability to combine cargo flows to all major European centers of consumption, providing excellent multi-modal connections.

[Read more](https://cspterminals.be/our-businesses/hinterland-connections/)

![Inland connections](https://cspterminals.be/wp-content/uploads/2018/09/0190-01_CSP_Zeebrugge_Fotoshoot_13092018_LR-84.jpg)

![Automated gate process](https://cspterminals.be/wp-content/uploads/2018/09/0190-01_CSP_Zeebrugge_Fotoshoot_13092018_LR-54.jpg)

![Automated Gate Access icon](https://cspterminals.be/wp-content/uploads/2018/08/0190-01_CSP_WEB_iconen-07-120x120.png)

## Automated gate process

Our fully automated gate process uses both optical character recognition and digital container readers. On top of this we also make use of biometric fingerprint scanning access.

[Gain access](https://cspterminals.be/our-businesses/automated-truck-gate/)

![Value Added Services icon](https://cspterminals.be/wp-content/uploads/2018/08/0190-01_CSP_WEB_iconen-08-120x120.png)

## Value added services

CPS Zeebrugge offers a wide range of value added services, including container weighing, reefer services, container repair, breakbulk and project cargo and fumigation.

[Read more](https://cspterminals.be/our-businesses/value-added-services/)

![](https://cspterminals.be/wp-content/uploads/2018/09/0190-01_CSP_Zeebrugge_Fotoshoot_13092018_LR-91-1.jpg)

# Direct access to European markets

## [Let’s meet](http://www.cspterminals.be/contact)

![container icon](https://cspterminals.be/wp-content/uploads/2018/08/0190-01_CSP_WEB_iconen-09-150x150.png)

More than 1.5 million TEU

![crane icon](https://cspterminals.be/wp-content/uploads/2018/08/0190-01_CSP_WEB_iconen-10-150x150.png)

7 super post-panamax

ZPMC gantry cranes

![railway icon](https://cspterminals.be/wp-content/uploads/2018/08/0190-01_CSP_WEB_iconen-11-150x150.png)

More than 2.340 meters railtracks

![filmdag-1-en-2-(729)_LR](https://cspterminals.be/wp-content/uploads/2018/08/filmdag-1-en-2-729_LR-300x300.jpg)

# Jobs

At CSP Zeebrugge we are looking for people who are open to continuous learning. Not only through classroom trainings, but also through training on the job and by learning from colleagues and interacting with other teams.

[Check out our vacancies](https://cspterminals.be/jobs2/)

[![](https://uwdenk.be/denkie/wp-content/uploads/2018/05/SiteByWit.png) Site by DENK! Creatieve marketing](https://denk.be/)

# CSP Zeebrugge Terminal ## CSP Zeebrugge Terminal Overview Update this profile ## - Year Founded - 2006 ![Year Founded](https://pitchbook.com/img/profile-preview/icons/flag.png) ## - Status - Acquired/​Merged ## - Employees - 80 ![Employees](https://pitchbook.com/img/profile-preview/icons/employee-count.png) ## - Latest Deal Type - 2ndary - Private ## - Financing Rounds - 4 ### CSP Zeebrugge Terminal General Information #### Description Operator of a port terminal in northwestern Europe based in Belgium, Zeebrugge. The company has an intermodal connection, including rail and access to the national and European highway systems as well as offers management and maintenance of shipping activities such as preservation of container vessels, haulage services, crane services, and related activities, enabling the European market to access the intermodal connections of the highway systems directly. #### Contact Information ##### Website [www.cspterminals.be](http://www.cspterminals.be/) Formerly Known As APM Terminals Zeebrugge Ownership Status Acquired/Merged (Operating Subsidiary) Financing Status Corporate Backed or Acquired ##### Corporate Office - Leopold II-Dam - Kaai 120 - 8380 Zeebrugge - Belgium +32 050 [](https://www.linkedin.com/company/csp-zeebrugge-terminal-nv) [](https://twitter.com/cspzeebrugge) [](https://www.facebook.com/CSPZeebrugge) Primary Industry Marine Other Industries Infrastructure Parent Company [COSCO Shipping Ports](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/59595-85) Vertical(s) [Infrastructure](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/industry/infrastructure) ##### Corporate Office - Leopold II-Dam - Kaai 120 - 8380 Zeebrugge - Belgium +32 050 [](https://www.linkedin.com/company/csp-zeebrugge-terminal-nv) [](https://twitter.com/cspzeebrugge) [](https://www.facebook.com/CSPZeebrugge) ### Want detailed data on 11M+ companies? What you see here scratches the surface [Request a free trial](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/request-access) ### Want to dig into this profile? We’ll help you find what you need [Learn more](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/request-access) ## CSP Zeebrugge Terminal Valuation & Funding | Deal Type | Date | Amount | Valuation/
